notes: Quality-passed promoted MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound TP4 result on 4x Intel Arc Pro B70. Full-logits path with VLLM_XPU_COMPILE_ALLREDUCE_NO_CLONE=1 and VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_CLONE_FINAL_HIDDEN=1; local-argmax disabled. Strict gates passed before benchmarking: raw145 n64/n256 exact token hashes, semantic suite, 16-repeat arithmetic exact 42, and extended sixpack. Two p512/n1536 repeats: 66.470/66.501 output tok/s; 88.627/88.667 total tok/s. No quality degradation detected under this corruption-focused harness.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: LABEL=no-clone-clonefinal-fulllogits-bench BENCH_REPEATS=2 RUN_EXTENDED_QUALITY=1 RUN_REPEAT_ARITHMETIC_QUALITY=1 REPEAT_ARITHMETIC_RUNS=16 VLLM_CACHE_ROOT=/mnt/fast-ai/vllm-cache-exp/minimax-strict-no-clone-clonefinal-fulllogits-20260517 VLLM_RUNTIME_REQUIRE_ANY_MARKERS=VLLM_XPU_COMPILE_ALLREDUCE_NO_CLONE,VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_CLONE_FINAL_HIDDEN VLLM_XPU_COMPILE_ALLREDUCE_NO_CLONE=1 VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_CLONE_FINAL_HIDDEN=1 VLLM_BENCH_TEMPERATURE=0 CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1 ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR=level_zero:0,1,2,3 ZE_AFFINITY_MASK=0,1,2,3 /home/steve/llm-optimizations-publish/scripts/run-minimax-strict-quality-gated-candidate.sh
